title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM Technology hosts a Mixture of Experts podcast live event discussing how AI is reshaping software engineering roles, the phenomenon of tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust AI budgets rapidly, NVIDIA's new RTX Spark superchip enabling large models on personal computers, and challenges universities face integrating AI literacy into curricula as students enter transformed workplaces.
